candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Bank loans and other interest-bearing short-term debt
candidates.why: Clean total for current interest-bearing debt; preferred because it already includes current debt without needing components.
Component of short-term debt/current maturities, but appears included in the total current interest-bearing debt line.
Component of the total short-term interest-bearing debt line.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Supplemental maturity disclosure; overlaps with current portion of long-term debt and likely the total short-term debt line.
Potential component, but blank and likely included in the clean total if present.

final_choice.row_label: Bank loans and other interest-bearing short-term debt

variables.notes: Chose the clean total current interest-bearing debt line and avoided double counting its components such as 'Current portion of long-term debt' and 'Bank loans and overdraft facilities'. Excludes lease rows.
